text:
Djel Sannes is a member of the Military Police.

Appearance

Sannes is a tall man with a short crop of dark-colored hair and bright eyes. He is seen wearing the Military Police uniform.

Story

Lyla and Rene notice a pair of Military Police officers, one of which Rene recognizes as Djel Sannes. The two hide from the MPs' sight, worrying that they have heard of their invention, and Rene decides to investigate. She finds Sannes and his fellow policeman at Mr. Smith's door, ordering him to come out. Rene asks Sannes about the situation, but Mr. Smith insists that everything is fine as the Military Police lead him away.
